title: notifications core — Artisan commands
description: Ops + development commands. Every command is idempotent + documented in --help.

commands.purpose: Walk every module's notifications.json + upsert NotificationCategory rows for the platform-default (tenant_id=null) set. Skips categories already present + logs deltas. --dry-run prints what would change.
invokedOn: manual after adding a new module's categories

commands.purpose: Read the emails render manifest (dist/manifest.json) + upsert NotificationTemplate rows with body_rendered_html + Blade placeholders for the platform-default set. Rendering happens at CI build time via packages/notifications-emails-renderer — this command consumes the artifact.

Send a real notification through the full pipeline (template resolution + preference resolution + channel dispatch) for a given category to a test recipient. Rate-limited to 10/day per operator. Used during template authoring to verify end-to-end delivery.
commands.safetyNote: Refuses to run in production unless --allow-production is passed. Even in production, sends only to the operator's own email domain (checked against user.email suffix).

commands.purpose: Hard-delete Notification rows past retention window. Emits audit rows before delete. Runs from schedule daily but can be invoked manually.
commands.safetyNote: Non-destructive by default (soft-delete-only mode). --hard-delete required to actually purge.

commands.purpose: Poll every channel module's reconciliation endpoint for delivery events missed by webhooks. Delegates to ReconciliationContract on the channel module. Runs from schedule every 15m but can be invoked manually with a longer lookback to catch up after an outage.
Dispatches ProcessDigestJob for every user whose configured window is currently at boundary (respecting user.timezone). Runs from schedule hourly.
Force-refresh category + template + preference resolver caches. Idempotent + fast. Also invoked from ApplicationBooted listener at boot.
